issues.title: [MAINTENANCE] Define prompt, model, schema, and curriculum review policy
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep coaching behavior and learner data compatible as curricula, prompts, models, and storage evolve.

## Scope

- Review cadence, compatibility window, migration policy, evaluation canaries, deprecation, and incident rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every prompt/model change runs the evaluation suite.
- [ ] Schema changes include export and rollback tests.
- [ ] Deprecated operations remain supported for the announced window.
- [ ] Future multi-user work cannot weaken owner privacy.
